title: dryopteris × australis
intro: Dryopteris × australis, also known as Austral fern or Austral lady fern, is a hybrid of two species of ferns, Dryopteris aurantiaca and Dryopteris celsa. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Dryopteris × australis include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve respiratory health, and provide antioxidant properties. Dryopteris × australis is typically used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, where it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
